FAILUsers can be listedConnectAs a Posit Team administratorsrc/vip_tests/connect/test_users.py::test_list_users0.40sTest procedureGiven Connect is accessible at the configured URLWhen I list all usersThen the user list is not emptyAnd the test user exists in the user listError tracebackCopyfixturefunc = <function check_test_user_in_list at 0x7f6918ca8ca0>
request = <FixtureRequest for <Function test_list_users>>
kwargs = {'user_list': [{'email': '', 'username': '__bootstrap_admin__', 'first_name': '', 'last_name': '', ...}], 'test_username': 'testuser'}

    def call_fixture_func(
        fixturefunc: _FixtureFunc[FixtureValue], request: FixtureRequest, kwargs
    ) -> FixtureValue:
        if inspect.isgeneratorfunction(fixturefunc):
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., Generator[FixtureValue]], fixturefunc)
            generator = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
            try:
                fixture_result = next(generator)
            except StopIteration:
                raise ValueError(f"{request.fixturename} did not yield a value") from None
            finalizer = functools.partial(_teardown_yield_fixture, fixturefunc, generator)
            request.addfinalizer(finalizer)
        else:
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., FixtureValue], fixturefunc)
>           fixture_result = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
                             ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^

.venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/_pytest/fixtures.py:1005: 
_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ 

user_list = [{'email': '', 'username': '__bootstrap_admin__', 'first_name': '', 'last_name': '', ...}]
test_username = 'testuser'

    @then("the test user exists in the user list")
    def check_test_user_in_list(user_list, test_username):
        if not test_username or not test_username.strip():
            pytest.skip("No test user configured — skipping user lookup assertion")
        test_username = test_username.strip()
        expected = test_username.split("@", 1)[0]
        usernames = [u.get("username") for u in user_list]
>       assert expected in usernames, (
            f"Test user {expected!r} (from {test_username!r}) not found in user list: {usernames}"
        )
E       AssertionError: Test user 'testuser' (from 'testuser') not found in user list: ['__bootstrap_admin__']
E       assert 'testuser' in ['__bootstrap_admin__']

src/vip_tests/connect/test_users.py:58: AssertionError

2026/07/07 22:26:48.398934045 function (file = if (onefile) "Rplots.pdf" else "Rplot%03d.pdf",
2026/07/07 22:26:48.398940297 width, height, onefile, family, title, fonts, version, paper,
2026/07/07 22:26:48.398978318 encoding, bg, fg, pointsize, pagecentre, colormodel, useDingbats,

2026/07/07 22:26:48.399007893 {
2026/07/07 22:26:48.399008925 initPSandPDFfonts()
2026/07/07 22:26:48.399023132 new <- list()
2026/07/07 22:26:48.399023983 if (!missing(width))
2026/07/07 22:26:48.399039002 new$width <- width
2026/07/07 22:26:48.399039853 if (!missing(height))
2026/07/07 22:26:48.399056014 new$height <- height
2026/07/07 22:26:48.399057206 if (!missing(onefile))
2026/07/07 22:26:48.399073296 new$onefile <- onefile
2026/07/07 22:26:48.399074188 if (!missing(title))
2026/07/07 22:26:48.399090135 new$title <- title

2026/07/07 22:26:48.399112627 new$fonts <- fonts
2026/07/07 22:26:48.399113509 if (!missing(version))
2026/07/07 22:26:48.399127585 new$version <- version
2026/07/07 22:26:48.399128367 if (!missing(paper))
2026/07/07 22:26:48.399141912 new$paper <- paper
2026/07/07 22:26:48.399144597 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/07/07 22:26:48.399157922 new$encoding <- encoding
2026/07/07 22:26:48.399158633 if (!missing(bg))
2026/07/07 22:26:48.399174583 new$bg <- bg
2026/07/07 22:26:48.399175475 if (!missing(fg))
2026/07/07 22:26:48.399206523 new$fg <- fg
2026/07/07 22:26:48.399207525 if (!missing(pointsize))
2026/07/07 22:26:48.399220279 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/07/07 22:26:48.399221160 if (!missing(pagecentre))
2026/07/07 22:26:48.399233776 new$pagecentre <- pagecentre
2026/07/07 22:26:48.399235980 if (!missing(colormodel))
2026/07/07 22:26:48.399289451 new$colormodel <- colormodel
2026/07/07 22:26:48.399290993 if (!missing(useDingbats))
2026/07/07 22:26:48.399308516 new$useDingbats <- useDingbats
2026/07/07 22:26:48.399309468 if (!missing(useKerning))
2026/07/07 22:26:48.399355785 new$useKerning <- useKerning
2026/07/07 22:26:48.399357358 if (!missing(fillOddEven))
2026/07/07 22:26:48.399376042 new$fillOddEven <- fillOddEven
2026/07/07 22:26:48.399376974 if (!missing(compress))
2026/07/07 22:26:48.399394327 new$compress <- compress
2026/07/07 22:26:48.399395258 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/07/07 22:26:48.399407579 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||
2026/07/07 22:26:48.399499431 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {

2026/07/07 22:26:48.399526893 if (inherits(family, "Type1Font") && !is.null(enc) &&
2026/07/07 22:26:48.399528165 enc != "default" && (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding ==
2026/07/07 22:26:48.399552864 "default"))
2026/07/07 22:26:48.399553986 old$encoding <- enc
2026/07/07 22:26:48.399569535 family <- family$metrics
2026/07/07 22:26:48.399570486 }
2026/07/07 22:26:48.399603809 if (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding == "default")
2026/07/07 22:26:48.399604831 old$encoding <- guessEncoding()
2026/07/07 22:26:48.399624378 if (!missing(family)) {
2026/07/07 22:26:48.399625089 if (length(family) == 4L) {
2026/07/07 22:26:48.399641439 family <- c(family, "Symbol.afm")
2026/07/07 22:26:48.399642321 }
2026/07/07 22:26:48.399657299 else if (length(family) == 5L) {
2026/07/07 22:26:48.399658261 }
2026/07/07 22:26:48.399672878 else if (length(family) == 1L) {
2026/07/07 22:26:48.399673710 pf <- pdfFonts(family)[[1L]]
2026/07/07 22:26:48.399687082 if (is.null(pf))
2026/07/07 22:26:48.399698867 stop(gettextf("unknown family '%s'", family),
2026/07/07 22:26:48.399699748 domain = NA)
2026/07/07 22:26:48.399718544 matchFont(pf, old$encoding)
2026/07/07 22:26:48.399719425 }
2026/07/07 22:26:48.399734083 else stop("invalid 'family' argument")
2026/07/07 22:26:48.399734864 old$family <- family
2026/07/07 22:26:48.399753219 }
2026/07/07 22:26:48.399754241 version <- old$version

2026/07/07 22:26:48.399828890 else stop("invalid PDF version")
2026/07/07 22:26:48.399829682 onefile <- old$onefile

2026/07/07 22:26:48.399866200 domain = NA)
2026/07/07 22:26:48.399866982 .External(C_PDF, file, old$paper, old$family, old$encoding,
2026/07/07 22:26:48.399893662 old$bg, old$fg, old$width, old$height, old$pointsize,
2026/07/07 22:26:48.399894624 onefile, old$pagecentre, old$title, old$fonts, version[1L],
2026/07/07 22:26:48.399917476 version[2L], old$colormodel, old$useDingbats, old$useKerning,
